ICookies Methods

One Identity Manager API Server

The ICookies type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
GetData
Returns a string stored in the client data.
SetData
Adds the string to the client data.
Top
Extension Methods
  NameDescription
GetDataEncodedT
Decodes an object stored in the client data.
(Defined by CookiesExtensionMethods.)
SetDataEncodedT
Encodes the object and adds it to the client data.
(Defined by CookiesExtensionMethods.)
